# AppDaddy.ai

> AppDaddy.ai is the world's fastest super-AI business ecosystem: find your niche, plan, build and launch a complete marketing funnel in about 10 minutes using 20+ AI apps under one login. For business owners, coaches, consultants, agencies, freelancers and course creators. 3,000+ subscribers, rated 4.9.

## What it is
AppDaddy puts strategy, content, websites/funnels, ads and AI assistants in one system that already knows your brand. The flow is Find, Think, Build, Launch: niche to live funnel in about 10 minutes, with no code and no team.

## The 20+ AI apps
- Strategy & Intelligence: Niche Finder, Knowledge Base, AEO Launchpad, AEO Website Builder, LMS, App Builder
- Content Studio: Video Studio, Image Studio, VidEd, Book Writer, AI Blog Writer, Humaniser
- Ads & Outreach: Meta Ads AI, WhatsApp API (official Meta WhatsApp Business API), IVR Call
- Assistants: Dual Chat (ChatGPT + Claude), AI Chatbot

## White Label (by request)
License the entire AppDaddy platform and sell it as your own product under your brand, logo and domain, to unlimited users at pricing you set. You own the customer relationship and the revenue.

## Black Label (by invitation)
The world's first Black Label business model. Enterprise-only; the deepest level of platform ownership and leverage, for those who qualify.

## Key facts
- Launch a complete marketing funnel in about 10 minutes
- 20+ AI apps under one login
- 3,000+ subscribers, 4.9 average rating
- No code, no team required

- Home: https://appdaddy.ai/
